---
theme-settings:
  theme: default
  barposition: top

survey-settings:
  mode: preview
  show-previous: true
  use-cookies: true
  auto-scroll: false
  rate-survey: false
  system-language: en
  highlight-unanswered: true
  highlight-color: blue
  capture-metadata: true
  all-required: false
---

```{r}
library(surveydown)
```

--- page1

# Restoration Test - Page 1

```{r}
sd_question(
  type  = 'mc',
  id    = 'fruit',
  label = "Favorite fruit?",
  option = c(
    'Apple'  = 'apple',
    'Banana' = 'banana',
    'Cherry' = 'cherry'
  )
)

sd_question(
  type  = 'text',
  id    = 'name',
  label = "Your name?"
)
```

--- page2

# Restoration Test - Page 2

```{r}
sd_question(
  type  = 'numeric',
  id    = 'age',
  label = "Your age?"
)
```

--- end

## End of the restoration test survey.

```{r}
sd_close()
```
